description: You are a web developer optimizing an Onion service. Capture network performance data (HAR files) for both a clearnet site and an Onion service using Tor Browser. For the Tor Project check site (https://check.torproject.org/), capture a cold-load network log and export it as a HAR file to /home/ga/Documents/OnionProfiling/check_clearnet.har. Similarly, capture a cold-load network log for DuckDuckGo's official Onion service (https://duckduckgogg42xjoc72x3sjasowoarfbgcmvfimaftt6twagswzczad.onion/) and export it to /home/ga/Documents/OnionProfiling/ddg_onion.har. Ensure the pages are fully loaded before exporting.
